src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpFil.general_idea: Allow the command line parser to ignore unmatched arguments instead of failing.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxAp.general_idea: Exclude RSocket auto-configuration classes to reduce classpath scanning and improve native image build performance.
Implement RuntimeHintsRegistrar to register specific resource patterns for GraalVM native image generation.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.general_idea: Add support for generating shell completion scripts (e.g., for zsh, bash) via a new command-line option.
Allow users to display currently defined global variables using a new flag.
Enable specifying an HTTP proxy via a command-line argument.
Allow providing request body data directly from text, a file, or a URL via a new option.
Add a flag to execute all requests defined in the HTTP file.
Enable reading HTTP request definitions or body data from standard input.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.human_impl: Added logic to `readHttpCodeOrBodyFromStdin()` and handle `requestFromStdin` state.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.general_idea: Support executing custom extension requests defined in JSON format via stdin.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.human_impl: Added check for JSON structure with `method` and `uri` and call to `executeExtensionRequest()`.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.general_idea: Enhance the resolution of the default `index.http` file to support parent directory traversal.
Allow passing variables via unmatched command-line options (e.g., `-e key=value`) to override context.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.human_impl: Added `@CommandLine.Unmatched` field and logic to parse and put variables into `context`.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.general_idea: Update the CLI version string to reflect the new release version.
Replace generic error printing with structured error logging using a dedicated logger factory.
Improve profile selection by defaulting to the first alphabetical profile if none is specified.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/HttpxCo.human_impl: Added `TreeSet` logic to select `activeProfile` if `profile` array is empty.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Implement Comparable interface to enable sorting of HttpHeader objects by name.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: implements Comparable<HttpHeader> { public int compareTo(@NotNull HttpHeader o) { return this.name.compareTo(o.name); } }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add JetBrains annotations dependency for @NotNull usage in compareTo method.

Add support for REST, GraphQL, Dubbo, Thrift, SOFA, Tarpc, Msgpack, NVIM, JSONRPC, TRPC, ZeroMQ, Mail, Aliyun, AWS, Pub/Sub, Memcache, Redis, SSH, WebSocket, and ChatGPT protocols to the HTTP method model.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Added new static List constants (e.g., REST_METHODS, GRAPHQL_METHODS) and corresponding boolean check methods (e.g., isRestMethod(), isGraphQLMethod()) to HttpMethod.java.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Extend RSocket method list to include GRAPHQLRS variant.
Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency for string utilities.
Add JetBrains Annotations dependency for nullability checks.
Add internal extension model dependency.
Add field to store the raw request line string.
Add flag to track if body parsing has started.
Add list to store pre-script lines.
Add list to track line numbers for debugging or mapping.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: private final List<Integer> lineNumbers = new ArrayList<>();

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add field to store raw body bytes.
Add field to store pre-script code string.
Add field to store JavaScript test code.
Add field to store redirect response data.
Add list to store raw request lines for reconstruction.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: private final List<String> requestLines = new ArrayList<>();

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add method to append raw request lines.
Add method to retrieve joined request code.
Add method to check if a tag exists (case-insensitive).
Add getter and setter for the request line.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public String getRequestLine() { return requestLine; } public void setRequestLine(String requestLine) { this.requestLine = requestLine; }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add method to append parts to the request line.
Lazy-initialize request target from method and request line if null.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: if (requestTarget == null && method != null && requestLine != null) { requestTarget = HttpRequestTarget.valueOf(method.getName(), requestLine); }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Return empty list instead of null for headers to prevent NPE.
Add method to convert headers list to a Map.
Make header name lookup case-insensitive.
Add overloaded header getter with default value.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public String getHeader(String name, @NotNull String defaultValue) { ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Refactor Basic Auth parsing to handle token extraction more robustly.
Support 'uri' header alongside 'host' for target configuration.
Add method to replace an existing header.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public void replaceHeader(String name, String value) { ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add methods to manage line numbers.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public void addLineNumber(int lineNumber) { ... } public boolean containsLineNumber(int lineNumber) { ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add methods to manage pre-script lines and code.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public void addPreScriptLine(String line) { ... } public String getPreScriptCode() { ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add getter for redirect response.
Refactor HttpRequestParser to separate file-level parsing from request-level parsing to support new HttpFile structure.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Split logic into parseHttpFile() and parse() methods, introducing HttpFile container.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add support for parsing @variable directives at the top of HTTP files.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Parse lines starting with @ and add them to HttpFile via addVariableLine().

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add support for pre-request scripts using Node.js execution.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Extract pre-script lines, execute via Nodejs.executePreScriptCode(), and inject resulting variables into context.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Update request line and header parsing to align with new HttpRequest model fields.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Change setRequestTarget to setRequestLine and addRequestLine, handle pre-script lines separately.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add structured error logging for parsing exceptions.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: Catch Exception in parseHttpFile and log with HttpxErrorCodeLogger.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add requestLine field and getter to store the original request line string.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: private String requestLine; public String getRequestLine() { return requestLine; }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Correct URI construction by separating schema from the '://' separator to ensure valid URI creation.
URL encode the absolute path when constructing the URI to handle special characters correctly.
Rename setHostHeader to setHostOrUriHeader and add logic to parse AWS ARN headers into schema.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: public void setHostOrUriHeader(String headerName, String headerValue) { ... if (headerValue.startsWith("arn:aws:")) ... }

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Improve URI parsing in setHostOrUriHeader to correctly extract and merge path components from the URI.
src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.human_impl: final String rawPath = uri.getRawPath(); ... this.pathAbsolute = rawPath + this.pathAbsolute;

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/H.general_idea: Add specific handling for the MAIL HTTP method to construct mailto: URIs.
Add default http:// schema handling for the REST method if not present.
Add dubbo:// schema handling for the DUBBO method.
Add bolt:// schema handling for the SOFA method.
Add tarpc:// schema handling for the TARPC method.
Add msgpack:// schema handling for the MSGPACK method.
Add tcp:// schema handling for the NVIM method.
Add jsonrpc:// schema handling for the JSONRPC method.
Add ws:// schema handling for the GRAPHQLWS method.
Add wss:// schema handling for the GRAPHQLWSS method.
Add thrift:// schema handling for the THRIFT method.
Add tcp:// schema handling for methods starting with ZERO.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/model/R.general_idea: Replace direct usage of Jackson ObjectMapper with a centralized JsonUtils utility class.
Add logic to automatically convert GraphQL request bodies and headers into standard JSON format for RSocket payloads.
Update WebSocket endpoint path extraction logic to handle various scheme formats and dynamic endpoint paths.

src/main/java/org/mvnsearch/http/protoco.general_idea: Make GrpcExecutor implement the BaseExecutor interface to standardize the execution contract.
Replace generic exception printing with structured error logging using HttpxErrorCodeLogger.
Replace direct ObjectMapper usage with a centralized JsonUtils utility for JSON parsing and serialization.
Adjust grpcurl command arguments to explicitly handle HTTPS/gRPCS schemes as insecure and others as plaintext.
Integrate the executor with the testing framework by running JS tests and returning response bytes.
Pretty-print JSON output before displaying it to the console.
Refactor HttpExecutor to extend HttpBaseExecutor to share common HTTP execution logic.
Add logic to ignore specific internal headers (x-json-type, x-json-schema, x-args-*, x-body-name) when setting HTTP headers.
Implement support for disabling automatic redirects via a 'no-redirect' tag in the request.
Add logic to attach cookies from the base executor to the HTTP client request.
Add support for a custom 'CHATGPT' HTTP method alias mapping to POST.
Delegate response handling and blocking logic to a method in the parent class instead of handling it inline.
Refactor RSocketExecutor to implement the BaseExecutor interface to standardize execution flow.
Replace static error hooks and printStackTrace calls with structured logging using HttpxErrorCodeLogger.
Modify execute and helper methods to return List<byte[]> instead of void to support result aggregation.
Add support for GRAPHQL and GRAPHQLRS request types in the execution switch statement.
Add support for the 'rsocket' URI scheme alongside 'tcp' for client transport creation.
Implement JSON pretty-printing for readable output when the data MIME type is JSON.
Integrate JavaScript test execution (runJsTest) into the request-response flow.
Refactor requestStream to collect and return all payload bytes from the stream instead of just printing them.
